privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a pre-loaded Topografix ExpertGPS dataset (fells_loop.gpx) containing waypoints for the Middlesex Fells Reservation in Massachusetts. Analysis of the geographic coordinates verifies that the target waypoints (BELLEVUE, BEAR HILL, SHEEPFOLD) correspond to real locations (Bellevue Pond parking, Bear Hill Tower, and Sheepfold parking), confirming the data is real and not synthetic.
